description: Opens with invitation or welcome ('تعال شوف', 'صباحك', 'تخيل معنا'). Establishes hospitality before product.
structural_recipe: Opens with invitation or welcome ('تعال شوف', 'صباحك', 'تخيل معنا'). Establishes hospitality before product.
why_it_works: Universal Saudi warmth. Single highest-leverage opener.
transplantation_caveats: Wrong for fintech / B2B / cold-clinical registers.
